title: Reference Data
description: Issuance and reference information about an asset. All fields are optional because reference data is heterogeneous across asset classes — for example, native digital commodities (BTC, ETH) have no issuer, jurisdiction, or issuance platform. Producers should populate whatever they can; consumers must handle absence.

issuerName.description: Legal name of the asset issuer. Absent for native digital commodities.

issuerLEI.description: Legal Entity Identifier (ISO 17442). Preferred over issuerName when available.

issuanceJurisdiction.description: Free-form jurisdiction label, when ISO 3166 country code is not sufficient (e.g. "British Virgin Islands", "Cayman Islands").

issuancePlatform.description: Issuance technology platform, when applicable (e.g. "Securitize", "Tokeny", "Circle"). Not applicable for native digital commodities or traditional securities.

offeringPageUrl.description: URL to the offering or product page.

prospectusUrl.description: URL to the prospectus or offering memorandum.
